name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with odkmerge
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what went wrong.

## Reproducible example

Please provide a minimal, reproducible example using a small `.xlsx` file
or one of the bundled fixtures in `inst/extdata/`.

```r
library(odkmerge)
# your code here
```

## Expected vs. actual behaviour

* What did you expect to happen?
* What actually happened? Include the full error message if any.

## Session info

Please paste the output of `sessionInfo()` (or `sessioninfo::session_info()`):

```r
sessionInfo()
```

## Additional context

Anything else we should know — operating system, ODK / KoboToolbox version,
attachments, screenshots, etc.
